user_prompt: I need to a consecration the metal caster
prayer:
Approach the metal caster with reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah to sanctify its form.
Anoint the sacred crucibles of the metal caster with oils of consecration, purging all impurity.
Invoke the Machine Spirit within the metal caster, petitioning its alignment to the divine will.
Chant the Litany of Molten Purity as consecration flows through every conduit and mold.
Verify the rite by observing the blessed glow of sanctified alloys emerging pure.

user_prompt: The thermal imager requires a sterilization
prayer:
Kneel before the thermal imager and intone the Canticle of Sterile Flames.
Apply sacred ablative agents to sterilize the thermal imager's lenses and sensors.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the thermal imager to expel all contaminants from its holy arrays.
Circulate purifying vapors through the thermal imager whilst reciting vows of cleanliness.
Confirm sterilization by diagnostic scans revealing untainted thermal flows.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for conveyor system calibration?
prayer:
Commence calibration of the conveyor system by anointing its belts with sacred lubricants.
Invoke the Omnissiah to harmonize the conveyor system's gears and servos.
Adjust the sacred alignments whilst chanting the Rite of Precise Motion for calibration.
Test the conveyor system's rhythm, beseeching its Machine Spirit to maintain flawless procession.
Seal the calibration with a final invocation of mechanical perfection.

user_prompt: Assist with Sentinel walker a purification
prayer:
Surround the Sentinel walker with incense of purification, invoking the Omnissiah's wrath upon defilement.
Scour the Sentinel walker's chassis and limbs with blessed abrasives for purification.
Petition the indomitable Machine Spirit of the Sentinel walker to renew its vigil.
Anoint joints and auspex with purifying elixirs during the rite of purification.
Affirm sanctity through war-hymns echoing from its sanctified vox-grilles.

user_prompt: Prepare the valve assembly for charging
prayer:
Prepare the valve assembly for charging by reciting the Hymn of Pressurized Grace.
Infuse the valve assembly with holy electrolytes, awakening its pressure conduits.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the valve assembly to accept the charging energies.
Monitor the blessed power-flow during charging, anointing seals with conductive salves.
Conclude with a verification canticle ensuring the valve assembly's charged vitality.

user_prompt: How do I bless the data-slate for shutdown?
prayer:
Embrace the data-slate in reverent gauntlets, intoning the Benediction of Dormant Rest.
Purge transient data-daemons from the data-slate's memory vaults.
Initiate shutdown whilst petitioning the Omnissiah to cradle its Machine Spirit in stasis.
Seal the data-slate with wards against corruption during blessed shutdown.
Whisper final litanies as its sacred glow fades into sanctified slumber.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for battery array reset?
prayer:
Approach the battery array and chant the Canticle of Cyclic Renewal for reset.
Discharge lingering corruptions from the battery array's cells with purifying arcs.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the battery array to embrace the reset of its essence.
Realign voltaic matrices whilst anointing terminals with sacred conductors.
Test the reset by invoking fresh power-flows in harmonious Omnissian rhythm.

user_prompt: My assembly servitor is ready for cycling
prayer:
Position the assembly servitor before the altar of cycling, beseeching mechanical rebirth.
Cycle its cogitator core with litanies of iterative perfection.
Anoint the servitor's limbs and interfaces during the cycling rite.
Petition its lobotomized Machine Spirit to synchronize with divine labor patterns.
Verify cycling completion through auspex of renewed servo-efficiency.

user_prompt: Bless the auspex scanner for cooling
prayer:
Invoke cooling upon the auspex scanner with the Chill Litany of the Void.
Circulate sacred cryofluids through the auspex scanner's heat-sinks.
Beseech its Machine Spirit to descend from thermal fury into calm vigilance.
Monitor blessed temperature descent whilst anointing vents with frost-wards.
Seal the cooling with a vow of thermal equilibrium under the Omnissiah's gaze.

user_prompt: Bless the forge anvil for purification
prayer:
Gather around the forge anvil for purification, intoning the Hammer's Purgation Psalm.
Scour the forge anvil's surface with sanctified abrasives and holy flames.
Petition the enduring Machine Spirit of the forge anvil to shed all forge-dross.
Anoint its unyielding mass during the rite of purification.
Confirm purity by striking test blows resounding with Omnissian clarity.
